text: Did you know a cluster of neurons controls your sleep by tracking daylight? Meet the SCN, your body's master clock, syncing with sunlight to regulate melatonin and alertness. When the sun rises, your SCN kicks in, reducing melatonin, waking you up! Studies show that disrupted light exposure can throw off your rhythm, leading to sleepless nights. Natural light is your ally. Embrace it in the morning to enhance your sleep at night. Want more insights into your body's secrets? Hit that follow button!
